title: French Smoked Chicken Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole featuring smoky chicken in a French-inspired gratin. This dish is perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: In a large skillet, cook the smoky bacon over medium heat until crispy. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same skillet, sauté the chopped onion until translucent. Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the diced chicken breast to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
In a separate saucepan, combine the grated gratin cheese and 1/4 cup of milk. Stir until smooth and melted.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of diced cassabe.
Add the cooked chicken mixture on top of the cassabe layer.
Pour the grated cheese sauce over the chicken mixture.
Top with the crispy smoky bacon and cubed french bread.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
